indicator: Understand relationship between disease prevention and quality of life.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate behavior that promotes health and disease prevention.
indicator: List and describe appropriate uses for prescription and over-the-counter medicine.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate behavior that promotes health and disease prevention.
indicator: Explain why following directions is important when using medicine.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate behavior that promotes health and disease prevention.
indicator: Describe how heredity can affect personal health (e.g., Thalassemia).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate behavior that promotes health and disease prevention.
indicator: Apply decision-making skills to make a health-enhancing choice.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Students will be able to recognize and value their own unique qualities, strengths, and talents.
indicator: Identify and appreciate their unique qualities, strengths, and talents.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Students will be able to recognize and value their own unique qualities, strengths, and talents.
indicator: Engage in activities that highlight individual achievements and contributions.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Students will be able to recognize and value their own unique qualities, strengths, and talents.
indicator: Self-reflect on personal areas of growth and improvement.

out_stmt: Demonstrate empathy and understanding towards others' perspectives and emotions.
indicator: Explore the concept of empathy and its role in understanding others' feelings.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate empathy and understanding towards others' perspectives and emotions.
indicator: Engage in role-playing activities to develop empathy and perspective-taking skills.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Demonstrate empathy and understanding towards others' perspectives and emotions.
indicator: Engage in a group project that promotes teamwork and cooperation.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Apply resilience skills to academic, social, and personal contexts.
indicator: Identify the importance of self-belief in developing resilience.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Apply resilience skills to academic, social, and personal contexts.
indicator: Practice positive self-talk and challenging negative thoughts.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Apply resilience skills to academic, social, and personal contexts.
indicator: Identify healthy coping strategies, such as mindfulness exercises, deep breathing, and physical activities.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Understand and learn specific behaviors that promote injury prevention and personal safety.
indicator: Identify environmental hazards outside the home (e.g., playgrounds, parks, school grounds).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Understand and learn specific behaviors that promote injury prevention and personal safety.
indicator: Identify risky situations that may need a decision and predict the potential outcomes.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Understand and learn specific behaviors that promote injury prevention and personal safety.
indicator: Talk about a variety of health behaviors (exercise, proper hygiene, diet, helmet use) that promote injury prevention.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Understand and learn specific behaviors that promote injury prevention and personal safety.
indicator: Identify the possible dangers of using networked digital environments (internet, mobile phones, wireless networks) and disclosing personal information.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Understand and learn specific behaviors that promote injury prevention and personal safety.
indicator: Talk about instances and dangers of cyberbullying and prevention strategies.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Students will recognize and practice health-enhancing behaviors to reduce health risks.
indicator: Identify violent, verbal and nonverbal behaviors such as abuse, assault, harassment, and bullying (verbal, physical, emotional).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Students will recognize and practice health-enhancing behaviors to reduce health risks.
indicator: Identify individuals and other sources to help and report abuse (e.g., parent, counselor, teacher, leading teacher).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Performs locomotor movement skills with agility and strength.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Use overarm throw in game situations (e.g., cricket).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Catches using one hand, preferred and non-preferred.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Kicks with either foot to a target.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Hit backhand.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Perform complex skipping routines (e.g., shifting from forward to backward and crossing arms) using a short rope.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform a broad range of fundamental movement skills and demonstrate how the body can move in relation to other objects and people.
indicator: Passes to a moving target from a stationary position (e.g., with hand, foot or equipment).

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Perform a dive-in entry.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Rotate the body about the vertical and horizontal axes with and without arm and leg action.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Perform an egg beater kick.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Swim continuously 25m freestyle, 25m survival backstroke or side stroke, 25m back crawl, 25m breaststroke.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Swim butterfly for 10 meters demonstrating a recognizable stroke and using correct breathing technique.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Perform survival sculling, floating or treading water for 4 minutes.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Perform a feet-first surface dive and swim underwater for a short distance.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Swim slowly for 6 minutes using three survival strokes, changing after each minute from one stroke to another.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform basic swimming strokes, underwater skills and survival techniques.
indicator: Perform a surface dive, swim underwater, search for and recover an object from water of depth equivalent to the child's height.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Participate 2–3 days each week in continuous moderate to vigorous physical activity to improve cardiovascular endurance.

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Identify that the heart is the most important muscle in the body and that increasing heart rate during physical activity strengthens the heart muscles.

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Perform a 'V' sit for an extended period of time with arms stretched forward.

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Move from a sitting to a standing position and from a lying to a sitting position without using arms.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Explain that strong muscles help prevent injury and produce more force.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Do simple stretching exercises without hyperflexing or hyperextending the joints.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Understand that proper body position while stretching will help prevent injury.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Engage in uninterrupted movement activities (games such as tag or follow the leader).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Identify body components (e.g., bones, muscles, fats, organs and tissues).
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Understand the body needs correct portions of food and water to function.
subject: H.PE

out_stmt: Perform physical activities that enhance fitness and fitness knowledge.
indicator: Participate in recognised health fitness assessment: cardiovascular endurance, muscular strength and endurance, flexibility and body composition.

out_stmt: Refine DMPs of educational gymnastics.

indicator: Perform landing from an apparatus (e.g., beam/bench).

indicator: Perform a sequence of cartwheels.
